/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/cuda-impl.dir/main.cu.o" "CMakeFiles/cuda-impl.dir/src/drawing.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cuda-impl.dir/src/kernels.cu.o" "CMakeFiles/cuda-impl.dir/src/maths.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cuda-impl.dir/src/physics.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cuda-impl.dir/src/bodies.cpp.o" -o cuda-impl   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12  -lraylib -lm -lpthread -lX11 -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
